task: Write a Python function that lists all S3 buckets in an AWS account using boto3 and returns their names as a list.
Create a JSON IAM policy that allows read-only access (GetObject) to all objects in a specific S3 bucket.
Write a regular expression to validate AWS ARNs (Amazon Resource Names).
Write a Python function that retrieves the current AWS account ID using boto3 STS.
Create a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function with a timeout of 10 seconds, memory size of 128 MB, and Python 3.11 runtime.
